name: Landen Leaf Floor Lamp - FLL4003 - Antique Gold - Safavieh
description: Elevate your home with the Landen 63.5 inch floor lamp. Crafted from iron, this piece boasts an antique gold finish that adds a touch of elegance to any decor. Its stately height makes it a perfect addition for ambient lighting in living rooms, bedrooms, or study areas. The Landen lamp not only illuminates your space but also serves as a striking sculptural element. Its refined design pairs beautifully with both contemporary and traditional settings. Transform your room and enjoy warm lighting that complements your style. Discover the charm of the Landen antique gold iron floor lamp and let its graceful presence enhance your home.
